creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
rm@,
Thanks for the quick fix.  Grabbed it from the freebsd-ports-bugs pool and was about 80% done before looking at the maintainer and realizing what happened.

For original submitter,
Use something like 'security/whatweb' at the start of the PR and it will get routed to the right person when you open it.  Should be quicker that way.  Hope this resolves all the issues you had.

Jason
